title: baeria chrysostoma subsp. hirsutula
intro: Baeria chrysostoma subsp. hirsutula, also known as the Hairy Baeria or Baeria, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, specifically used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is known to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing irritated mucous membranes. Baeria chrysostoma subsp. hirsutula can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits.
